zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Arthur Kaye於1489年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾武德頌 李斯時，他的父親George Kaye35歲，母親Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe31歲。他於1509年5月25日與Biatryx Wentworth在英國英格蘭越可爾阿爾蒙德波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1574年10月16日在英國越可爾阿爾蒙德波利享年85歲，埋葬在英國越可爾阿爾蒙德波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Arthur Kaye于1489年出生在英国英格兰越可爾武德頌 李斯时，他的父亲George Kaye35岁，母亲Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe31岁。他于1509年5月25日与Biatryx Wentworth在英国英格兰越可爾阿爾蒙德波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1574年10月16日在英国越可爾阿爾蒙德波利享年85岁，埋葬在英国越可爾阿爾蒙德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Kaye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire), Irish (Kerry), and North German: variant of   Kay  . Compare   Keye  .

variants.name: Kay
meanings: English: nickname from northern Middle English ka, kae, kay ‘jackdaw’, from Old Norse ká or Old English cā. See also Daw .
English: nickname from Middle English cai, kay, kei ‘left-handed, clumsy’.

English: occasionally perhaps an occupational name from Middle English kai(e), kei(e) ‘key’, applied to a maker of keys (compare Kear ), or alluding to the office of keeper or bearer of keys, but clear evidence for this is wanting.

variants.name: Keye
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire), Irish (Kildare), and North German: variant of   Kaye  .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Arthur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Celtic origin. King Arthur was a British king of the 5th or 6th century, about whom virtually no historical facts are known. He ruled in Britain after the collapse of the Roman Empire and before the coming of the Germanic tribes, and a vast body of legends grew up around him in the literatures of medieval Western Europe. His name is first found in the Latinized form Artorius; it is of obscure etymology. The spelling with -th- was popular among the gentry families of West Yorkshire in the late 1400s, even before Henry VII , who may have hoped to capitalize on the legend, gave the name to his son. It remained in regular use in some areas and its popularity exploded in the early 19th century, largely as a result of the fame of Arthur Wellesley ( 1769–1852 ), Duke of Wellington, the victor at the Battle of Waterloo and subsequently prime minister. Further influences were Tennyson's Idylls of the King ( 1859–85 ), and the widespread Victorian interest, especially among the Pre-Raphaelites, in things medieval in general and in Arthurian legend in particular.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Arthur Kaye was born in 1489, in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, George Kaye, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe, was 31. He married Biatryx Wentworth on 25 May 1509, in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 October 1574, in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 85, and was buried in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Arthur Kaye est né en 1489, à Woodsome Lees, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George Kaye, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Biatryx Wentworth le 25 mai 1509, à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1574, à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Almondbury, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Arthur Kaye 1489 in Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Kaye 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe 31. Er hat am 25. Mai 1509 in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Biatryx Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1574 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Almondbury, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Arthur Kaye è nato il nel 1489 nel Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George Kaye, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Biatryx Wentworth il 25 maggio 1509, nel Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 ottobre 1574, nel Almondbury, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Almondbury, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Arthur Kayeが1489年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウッドソメ リーズで生まれた時，父George Kayeは35歳，母Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffeは31歳であった。1509年5月25日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーでBiatryx Wentworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1574年10月16日にイギリスヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーで85歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアアルモンドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Arthur Kaye(이)가 1489년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 우드소 리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Kaye(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1509년 5월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 알몽버이에서 Biatryx Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1574년 10월 16일 영국 요르크실르 알몽버이에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 알몽버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Arthur Kaye nasceu em 1489, em Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, George Kaye, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Biatryx Wentworth em 25 de maio de 1509, em Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1574, em Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Arthur Kaye родился в 1489 г. в местности вудсом лись, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George Kaye было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Biatryx Wentworth 25 мая 1509 г. в местности алмондбури, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 октября 1574 г. в местности алмондбури, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности алмондбури, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Arthur Kaye nació en 1489, en Woodsome Lees, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George Kaye, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Margaret Elizabeth Radcliffe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Biatryx Wentworth el 25 de mayo de 1509, en Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1574, en Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Almondbury, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
